hero.title: A Sanctuary of Serenity
hero.subtitle: Experience the timeless elegance of Moroccan hospitality in the heart of the medina.

rooms.title: Our Rooms
rooms.page_subtitle: Discover your perfect sanctuary. Each room is uniquely designed with authentic Moroccan craftsmanship and modern comforts.
rooms.empty: No rooms found for this category.

home.featured_subtitle: Experience authentic luxury in our carefully curated suites.

footer.description: A sanctuary of purity and serenity in the heart of the Medina. Experience the authentic warmth of Moroccan hospitality.
footer.rights: © {{year}} Dar Safaa Riad. All rights reserved.

amenities_page.title: Our Amenities
amenities_page.subtitle: Discover the exclusive services and facilities designed to make your stay unforgettable.
amenities_page.pool_desc: Cool off in our traditional zellige-tiled plunge pool, an oasis of serenity in the heart of the courtyard.
amenities_page.rooftop_desc: Enjoy breakfast or a sunset mint tea with unobstructed views of the Medina and Atlas Mountains.
amenities_page.breakfast_desc: A daily spread of fresh Moroccan pastries, fruits, and delicacies served wherever you please.
amenities_page.spa_desc: Experience authentic Moroccan wellness with our private in-house hammam and massage services.

about_page.title: The House of Safaa
about_page.subtitle: A legacy of Moroccan hospitality, beautifully preserved.
about_page.story_desc1: Dar Safaa was built in the 18th century as a private mansion for a noble merchant family. Today, it stands as a testament to the enduring beauty of traditional Moroccan craftsmanship.
about_page.story_desc2: Every carved cedar wood panel and zellige tile tells a story of our heritage. We invite you to experience the warmth and elegance that has graced these walls for generations.
about_page.philosophy_desc: True luxury is found in tranquility and personalized care. At Dar Safaa, we anticipate your needs before you even realize them, ensuring a stay that feels both majestic and like coming home.

contact_page.title: Contact Us
contact_page.subtitle: We are here to assist with reservations, special requests, or any questions you may have.
